title: Core Agent Architecture

classes.name: GeneraticAgent
methods: __init__(self) -> None  # builds llmclients from mykeys config
next_llm(self, n=-1) -> None  # rotate LLM, reload tool schema
abort(self) -> None  # sets stop_sig, signals handler
run(self) -> None  # main loop: dequeues tasks, calls agent_runner_loop

classes.name: BaseHandler
methods: tool_after_callback(self, tool_name, args, response, ret) -> None
turn_end_callback(self, response, tool_calls, tool_results, turn, next_prompt, exit_reason) -> str
dispatch(self, tool_name, args, response, index=0) -> Generator[str, None, StepOutcome]  # routes to do_<tool_name>
classes.notes: dispatch() calls do_<tool_name> via reflection; unknown tools return StepOutcome with error prompt

classes.name: StepOutcome
classes.notes: Controls loop continuation: should_exit=True → EXITED; next_prompt=None → CURRENT_TASK_DONE

standalone_functions.name: load_tool_schema
standalone_functions.description: Reads assets/tools_schema{suffix}.json into global TOOLS_SCHEMA; replaces 'powershell'→'bash' on non-Windows

standalone_functions.name: get_system_prompt
standalone_functions.description: Reads assets/sys_prompt.txt, appends today's date and global_memory content

standalone_functions.name: agent_runner_loop
standalone_functions.signature: agent_runner_loop(client, system_prompt, user_input, handler, tools_schema, max_turns=40, verbose=True, initial_user_content=None) -> Generator
standalone_functions.description: Core agentic loop: builds message list, iterates turns calling client.chat(), dispatches tool calls via handler.dispatch(), accumulates tool_results, calls turn_end_callback. Exits on should_exit, no next_prompt, or max_turns.

standalone_functions.name: try_call_generator
standalone_functions.description: Unified call wrapper: yield-from if result is iterable generator, else return directly

standalone_functions.name: exhaust
standalone_functions.description: Drains a generator and returns its StopIteration value

key_relationships: GeneraticAgent owns GenericAgentHandler (composition, created per task in run())
GeneraticAgent depends_on load_tool_schema (called in __init__ and next_llm())
agent_runner_loop depends_on BaseHandler.turn_end_callback (end of each turn)
GeneraticAgent.run() yields chunks from agent_runner_loop into display_queue
interaction_flow: GeneraticAgent.__init__: builds llmclients from mykeys; calls load_tool_schema()
GeneraticAgent.run(): calls agent_runner_loop(llmclient, sys_prompt, user_input, handler, TOOLS_SCHEMA)
agent_runner_loop: builds messages=[system, user]; loops up to max_turns
agent_runner_loop turn N: client.chat(messages, tools) → response
agent_runner_loop: parses response.tool_calls → list of {tool_name, args, id}
agent_runner_loop: for each tool_call → handler.dispatch(tool_name, args, response)
BaseHandler.dispatch: calls tool_before_callback → do_<tool_name> → tool_after_callback → returns StepOutcome
agent_runner_loop: handler.turn_end_callback(response, tool_calls, tool_results, turn, next_prompt, exit_reason)
agent_runner_loop: messages = [{role:user, content:next_prompt, tool_results}]; next turn
GeneraticAgent.run(): streams chunks to display_queue; final done event with full_resp

patterns: /session.<attr>=<value>  → setattr(llmclient.backend, attr, value); returns None (skip task)
/resume → returns expanded Chinese prompt for session recap
anything else starting with / → passed through unchanged

run_modes: interactive: stdin loop, inc_out=True, streams chunks
task mode (--task): file IO in temp/<task>/, polls reply.txt for multi-round
reflect mode (--reflect): loads monitor script, calls mod.check() on interval, dispatches non-None results
exit_outcomes: CURRENT_TASK_DONE: StepOutcome.next_prompt is None/empty and no done_hooks
important_notes: GenericAgentHandler (from ga module) is the concrete subclass of BaseHandler — it implements all do_<tool_name> methods. TOOLS_SCHEMA is a module-level global reloaded by load_tool_schema(). The llmclient history lives in the *Session backend object, so swapping clients via next_llm() transfers history. done_hooks is a list of extra prompts injected at turn-end before breaking.
